result.stderr:
Siren.Tool 1.0.0+537d940950b0e7c752db4f892ba043a06a6c2bf6
Copyright (C) 2026 Siren.Tool

  -a, --assemblyPath          Migration assembly file path.

  -o, --outputPath            Required. Output markdown file path.

  -m, --markdownAnchor        Markdown anchor for defined section.

  -c, --connectionString      Database connection string.

  -f, --filterEntities        Comma-separated list of entity-substrings to
                              filter. Only entities that contain any of these
                              substrings will be included in the output. E.g.
                              'User,Group' will select all entities that contain
                              'User' or 'Group' in name.

  -s, --skipEntities          Comma-separated list of entities to skip.

  -h, --filterSchemas         Comma-separated list of table schemas to filter.
                              Only entities belonging to schemas that contain
                              any of these substrings will be included in the
                              output. E.g. 'dbo,reporting' will select all
                              entities belonging to 'dbo.' or 'reporting.'
                              database schemas.

  -x, --skipSchemas           Comma-separated list of schemas to skip.

  -t, --template              (Default: default) Render template (e.g.
                              AzureDevOps). Default is 'default'.

  -l, --customLayoutHeader    Where a layout header is used, it can be
                              overwritten here. The default value is %%{init:
                              {'theme':'neutral'}}%%

  --help                      Display this help screen.

  --version                   Display version information.

options.description: Where a layout header is used, it can be overwritten here. The default value is %%{init: {'theme':'neutral'}}%%

Comma-separated list of entity-substrings to filter. Only entities that contain any of these substrings will be included in the output. E.g. 'User,Group' will select all entities that contain 'User' or 'Group' in name.

Comma-separated list of table schemas to filter. Only entities belonging to schemas that contain any of these substrings will be included in the output. E.g. 'dbo,reporting' will select all entities belonging to 'dbo.' or 'reporting.' database schemas.
Comma-separated list of entities to skip.
Comma-separated list of schemas to skip.
